Could you explain this number?
Good morning, Maisa. You are early today!
Good morning, David. Yes, I usually get to work at nine, but today I am early.
Great. Can we schedule our meeting for this week?
Sure. I have an appointment at ten, so let us meet on Tuesday at three.
Perfect. Oh, the phone is ringing. Can you get it?
Of course. Good morning, finance team, Maisa speaking. He is not here, would you like to leave a message?
Nice work. Now, are you busy with the report?
Yes. I do not understand one number. Could you help me?
Of course. Which number?
The total for March. Could you explain it, please?
I usually get to work at nine.
Can we meet on Tuesday at three?
Would you like to leave a message?

Hi Maisa, this is David. Let me tell you about my morning at work. I usually wake up at seven and I get to work at nine. This morning, I have an appointment at ten, so I want to schedule our meeting for the afternoon. Can we meet on Tuesday at three? Also, a client called, but I was not at my desk, so my colleague took a message. One more thing: I do not understand one number in the report. Could you help me later? Thank you very much. See you soon!

Good morning, this is Sarah from the finance team. Here is my morning at work. I always get to work early, at eight o'clock. First, I answer the phone and check my messages. Then I look at my schedule for the day. Today I have a meeting on Wednesday at ten, so I need to confirm the time with David. In the afternoon, I usually help my team with the reports. If someone does not understand a number, I explain it slowly. I love my job. Have a great day!
Good morning. I usually get to work at eight. First, I answer the phone. Then I schedule a meeting for the afternoon. Later, I ask David to help me with the report.
